message: Cached generated method instruction indexes, successor lists, and predecessor lists on GeneratedMethodFlow; meter analysis now uses cached graph data instead of rescanning instructions.

Verified generated meter analysis caching: GeneratedMethodFlow stores IndexByOffset, SuccessorsByOffset, and PredecessorsByOffset; GeneratedMethodMeterAnalyzer uses cached predecessor/index/successor lookups for immediate meter, unmetered-work, and sparse-meter analysis. Focused verifier metering/shape tests passed: dotnet test tests\SafeIR.Tests\SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~VerifierShapeHardeningTests|FullyQualifiedName~VerifierRuntimeMeteringTests|FullyQualifiedName~VerifierCompiledShapeTests' (18 passed). CodeEnforcer passed via scripts\check-csharp-file-lines.ps1. agentq doctor returned doctor ok.
